formats.description: SquashFS with compression disabled for data and metadata
generated EROFS lz4hc rootfs with 4096B clusters
generated EROFS lz4hc rootfs with 16384B clusters
generated EROFS lz4hc rootfs with 65536B clusters
generated EROFS lz4hc rootfs with 131072B clusters

dax.reason: Capsem KVM rootfs is currently virtio-blk backed. DAX requires a separate virtiofs-DAX or pmem-style mapping path, so this harness records it as a capability audit item rather than pretending a block image can exercise DAX.

cmdline.raw: console=ttyS0 root=/dev/vda ro loglevel=1 quiet init_on_alloc=1 slab_nomerge page_alloc.shuffle=1 random.trust_cpu=1 capsem.storage=virtiofs capsem.rootfs=squashfs capsem.bench_lower=1 capsem.vsock_port_offset=34520 virtio_mmio.device=0x200@0xd0000000:5 virtio_mmio.device=0x200@0xd0000200:6 virtio_mmio.device=0x200@0xd0000400:7 virtio_mmio.device=0x200@0xd0000600:8 virtio_mmio.device=0x200@0xd0000800:9
